The '''Ministry of Internal Security''' was an organization established by [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] during the height of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] to protect the lives of [[Senator/Legends|senators]] as well as other government officials. The Ministry converted several holding facilities into safehouses for its purposes. It denied the destruction of one of its facilities despite the destruction of the safehouse where [[Lavina Durada-Vashne Wren|Lavina Wren]] was located, which was the result of foul play. This caused many to question the ministry's activities and its true nature.
